content.passage: Thank you for tuning into the Daily Cup of Tea podcast. It’s Friday, and as always, we have invited a special guest on our show to spill the tea on what has happened this week. Please welcome a veteran journalist, a published author and a marketing specialist, Cindy Wagner, who is joining us live at the studio today.

You are watching the Evening Traffic Updates on Channel Eleven. There has been a crash on Turnpike Avenue near Danes Boulevard causing extreme rush hour traffic. It is reported that a large truck, a sedan and a bus are involved in this accident so it might take a while to clear out the roads. Drivers are advised to take a detour to avoid traffic.

content.prompt: Describe the picture in as much detail as you can.
Describe the picture in as much detail as you can.

content.question: When was the last time you visited a new city who did you go there with?
When you visit a new city would you prefer to stay at a hotel or find a place where you could stay with your friends and family?

Which of the following activities do you think you must try when visiting a new city?
- Eating at a local restaurant
- Shopping in the neighborhood
- Going on a guided tour

Question 8: Where will the interviews take place what time will the first interview start?

Question 9: I was told that there are two applicants who are applying for the product manager position. Is that right?

Question 10: Can you tell me about the applicants who are applying for the receptionist position?

content.prompt: Do you prefer to keep your old clothes or books that you don't use anymore instead of getting rid of them? Why?

content.passage: Thank you for joining the number one source for your local weather forecast. It seems like Richmond will be having a rainy weekend. Make sure to gear up with an umbrella, a rain coat or rainboots when going outdoors this weekend. Stay tuned for sports news after hearing a word from our sponsor.

Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to the grand opening of The Taco Joint. We started off as a food truck in Fresno in 2011. Thanks to all of you, we now have a store here on the Fifth Street. I just hope that we could provide locals with good food, drinks and snacks for years to come. Make sure to come by The Taco Joint when you feel like having some authentic Mexican food.

content.prompt: Describe the picture in as much detail as you can.
Describe the picture in as much detail as you can.

content.question: What was your first ever job how long did you do it for?
Do you prefer to work during the daytime or during the night time? Why?
What are some advantages of working in a busy city rather than working in a quiet area?

Question 8: What time will the orientation start and end?

Question 9: Will I have to bring my own lunch?

Question 10: I was told that I will be leading an education session in the afternoon. Can you tell me the details of the session that I will be leading?

content.prompt: Some people think that the company should increase the salary of all the employees every year. Others think that the company should increase the salary of the employees who only bring good results? What is your opinion on this matter.

parts.label: Topic Preparation
parts.instruction: Think about your answers to the following questions. You will discuss these topics in the next class. Take 30 seconds to prepare each one.
questions: Describe your ideal job. What kind of work environment would you prefer — an office, working from home, or outdoors? Why?
What skills do you think are most important to succeed in today's job market? Give examples.
Have you ever had a part-time job or helped with work at home? What did you learn from that experience?
Some people choose a job for the salary, while others choose based on passion. Which do you think is more important, and why?
How do you think technology is changing the way people work? Give one example of a job that has changed because of technology.

vocab.example: The company's annual revenue exceeded $5 million.
The project will take approximately three weeks.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused by the delay.
The quarterly report showed strong growth.

structures.example:
Due to the heavy rain, the event was postponed.
Due to increasing demand, we hired more staff.

I'd like to start by introducing our new team member.
I'd like to discuss the upcoming schedule changes.

vocab.example: Don't hesitate to contact us if you have questions.
We were thrilled to hear the good news.
Please ask for assistance if you need help.

structures.example:
Feel free to ask any questions during the presentation.
Feel free to contact me anytime.

structures.pattern: In my opinion / From my point of view
structures.example:
In my opinion, working from home increases productivity.
From my point of view, this is the best approach.
